overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk along a waterfront promenade in a futuristic neon-lit city, transitioning into a covered urban corridor. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, holographic advertisements, and sparse pedestrian activity.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade with the city skyline ahead

entered.detail: concrete railing separating walkway from dark water
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage
covered waiting area with glass panels and illuminated advertisements
tall buildings covered with bright neon advertisements and holographic displays
large floating holographic display hovering above the skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide waterfront promenade at night, with a concrete barrier on the left separating the walkway from the water. The futuristic city skyline rises in the distance, dominated by neon-lit skyscrapers and floating holographic advertisements. Bus shelters line the right side of the path, and the wet concrete reflects the mixed lighting from street lamps and building signs.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront approach toward a corner

entered.detail: tall pole with bright overhead light illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the waterfront promenade, the camera approaches a corner where the path turns right. The bus shelters recede into the distance on the right, while street lamps become more prominent in the foreground. A few pedestrians become visible walking in the opposite direction in the distance.

events.description: turns right from open waterfront into covered street corridor beneath an overpass

agents.ego_description: turning right into a covered walkway and continuing forward alongside a street

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction along the covered walkway

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure covering the walkway and blocking the sky
dark metal and concrete building facade with ventilation grilles
series of large illuminated digital screens displaying advertisements on the overpass
wet asphalt road with occasional moving vehicles visible to the right

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right from the open waterfront into a semi-covered urban corridor beneath a massive overpass. The environment shifts from open sky to an enclosed space with a concrete ceiling overhead. Large digital billboards line the right side above the street, while a dark building wall runs along the left. The ground remains wet and reflective under artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered corridor with overhead digital displays

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor beneath large digital billboards and neon displays

notable_agents.action: walking ahead while looking at a handheld device

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the covered corridor, the camera passes beneath massive digital billboards that dominate the overhead space with bright neon advertisements. The lighting shifts to a more pronounced neon tone. Other pedestrians are visible ahead, walking in the same direction through the enclosed urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep covered urban walkway between industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian through the narrow covered walkway between tall buildings

notable_agents.action: walking steadily ahead through the covered passage

entered.detail: large industrial ventilation fans and exhaust units mounted on the building wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through a narrower, more enclosed section of the covered walkway. The digital billboards are now behind, replaced by industrial building walls featuring large ventilation equipment. The camera follows a pedestrian walking ahead through the dimly lit corridor, with the street visible but empty of traffic to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, neon-lit waterfront promenade into a confined, subterranean urban corridor. It begins on a wide concrete walkway beside a barrier, where the wet ground reflects the glow of a distant skyline filled with skyscrapers and floating holographic advertisements. As the camera advances, the bus shelters on the right recede and the perspective shifts toward a corner where a few distant pedestrians appear. The scene then turns right, transitioning from the open night sky into a semi-covered space beneath a massive concrete overpass. This movement concludes as the environment closes in, shifting the focus to large digital billboards and dark building walls that flank the reflective street.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant neon-lit urban canyon that gradually narrows into a dim industrial corridor. It begins by moving deeper into a covered walkway, passing beneath massive digital billboards that bathe the overhead space in bright, saturated neon tones. As the camera advances, the open atmosphere of the commercial district shifts, following other pedestrians through the enclosed space. The scene then transitions away from the glowing advertisements and into a more constricted section of the walkway, where the lighting fades and the walls are lined with heavy industrial ventilation equipment. Finally, the camera trails a lone figure through the dimly lit passage, with an empty street visible to the right.
